# M.D JEWELRY

A handmade jewelry business crafting unique, artisanal pieces. The brand centers around craftsmanship, individuality, and the beauty of handcrafted accessories, appealing to customers who value authenticity and one-of-a-kind wearable art.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Adorn Yourself with Artisan Elegance — M.D JEWELRY

URL: https://example.com
Description: Discover M.D Jewelry, where luxury meets every curve. Explore our exclusive collection of handcrafted, one-of-a-kind jewelry designed for those who cherish authentic wearable art. Shop now.

## M.D Jewelry | Luxury in Every Curve






Our commitment to artistry defines every handcrafted piece. Discover the values that shape our atelier.











### Artisanal Craftsmanship


Every piece is meticulously shaped and finished by hand in our studio, ensuring no two creations are ever exactly alike.









### Heirloom Quality


We source ethically-mined gemstones and recycled precious metals to create enduring treasures designed to be passed down through generations.









### Bespoke Consultations


Collaborate directly with our designer to bring your vision to life. From custom engagement rings to statement necklaces, your story is our blueprint.



















## M.D Jewelry | Luxury in Every Curve


At M.D JEWELRY, we believe that true beauty lies in the details only human hands can shape. Each piece is born from a deep reverence for traditional goldsmithing, where molten metal and raw gemstones are transformed into wearable art. We don't chase trends; we create heirlooms that carry a story, a touch, and a soul. Our process is slow, intentional, and unwavering in its commitment to quality—because luxury should feel as authentic as it looks.


From the initial sketch to the final polish, every curve is guided by passion and precision. We source conflict-free stones and recycled precious metals, honoring both the earth and the wearer. The result is a collection of one-of-a-kind accessories designed for those who value individuality and timeless elegance over mass production.

Discover Our Craft












## M.D Jewelry | Luxury in Every Curve








Each piece is handcrafted with intention, designed to celebrate your unique story. Discover the artistry behind every curve and let us create something unforgettable for you.


Get in Touch
Explore Collection












Handcrafted elegance, designed to be cherished for generations. Each piece tells a story of artistry and devotion.

## Our Craftsmanship Services


M.D Jewelry | Luxury in Every Curve — every piece is a testament to artisanal dedication and timeless beauty.









### Bespoke Design


Collaborate with our master artisans to create a one-of-a-kind piece that reflects your personal story. From initial sketch to final polish, every detail is meticulously handcrafted to your vision.

Begin Your Design  →








### Engagement & Bridal


Celebrate your most cherished moments with rings that embody eternal love. We guide you through selecting ethically sourced stones and hand-forging a setting as unique as your bond.

Explore Bridal  →








### Heirloom Restoration


Breathe new life into treasured family pieces. Our restoration experts delicately repair, clean, and preserve vintage jewelry, ensuring your heirlooms continue to tell their stories for generations.

Restore Your Treasure  →















## Ready to Adorn Your Story?








Every piece at M.D Jewelry is a conversation between precious metals and personal milestones. Whether you dream of a bespoke engagement ring, a reimagined heirloom, or a signature everyday treasure, our hands are ready to bring your vision to life with uncompromising craftsmanship.



Begin Your Commission
Explore Our Services













Handcrafted elegance, designed to be cherished for generations. Each piece tells a story of artistry and devotion.

## Meet the Hands Behind the Masterpieces — M.D JEWELRY

URL: https://example.com/about
Description: Delve into the passion and philosophy of M.D Jewelry. Learn about our dedication to artisanal techniques and the stories woven into every curve of our handcrafted collections. Discover our journey.

Meet the Hands Behind the Masterpieces — M.D JEWELRY













































Skip to main content

















- Products Products




- Home
- Services
- About
- Contact














Products

























# Our Story of Craft


### Discover the hands, heart, and heritage behind every M.D Jewelry piece
























## Our Story


M.D Jewelry | Luxury in Every Curve



Founded in the heart of a vibrant artisan community, M.D Jewelry was born from a singular belief: that true luxury lies in the details only human hands can create. Every piece we craft is a testament to patience, precision, and passion. We reject the impersonal uniformity of mass production, choosing instead to celebrate the subtle imperfections that make each creation uniquely yours.


Our founder, a third-generation goldsmith, spent years studying ancient metalworking techniques before establishing our atelier. From the initial sketch to the final polish, our process is intimate and deliberate. We source ethically mined gemstones and recycled precious metals, ensuring that your jewelry not only looks beautiful but carries a story of integrity and respect for the earth.


At M.D Jewelry, we don't just design accessories; we curate heirlooms. Our mission is to create wearable art that captures moments, memories, and emotions—pieces that will be passed down through generations. This is luxury redefined: personal, sustainable, and profoundly human.


Discover the Collection










## The Artisans Behind M.D Jewelry





Every piece at M.D Jewelry is shaped by hands that care deeply about craftsmanship, detail, and the story each jewel tells. Meet the dedicated team bringing luxury and individuality to life.












### Maya Dahan


Founder & Head Designer


With over 15 years of experience in fine jewelry, Maya founded M.D Jewelry to celebrate the beauty of imperfection. Her designs are inspired by organic forms and ancient goldsmithing techniques, ensuring every piece is a wearable work of art.











### Elior Cohen


Master Goldsmith


Elior is the steady hand behind our most intricate metalwork. Trained in traditional Yemenite filigree, he brings decades of technical precision to the studio, transforming raw precious metals into delicate, flowing structures.











### Lior Shavit


Gemologist & Stone Setter


Lior's eye for exceptional stones is unmatched. She travels the world to source ethically mined gems that possess unique character, then sets them with a precision that maximizes their natural brilliance and fire.















Handcrafted elegance, designed to be cherished for generations. Each piece tells a story of artistry and devotion.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy

































- Products Products




- Home
- Services
- About
- Contact
















# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/3/2026



M.D JEWELRY ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: M.D JEWELRY

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement

































- Products Products




- Home
- Services
- About
- Contact
















# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 3, 2026



M.D JEWELRY is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: M.D JEWELRY

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.















Handcrafted elegance, designed to be cherished for generations. Each piece tells a story of artistry and devotion.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions

































- Products Products




- Home
- Services
- About
- Contact
















# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 3, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - M.D JEWELRY

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Handmade Jewelry provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


M.D JEWELRY provides Handmade Jewelry through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by M.D JEWELRY. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: M.D JEWELRY

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]
